## Deliverables Checklist

### General
- [ ] Code compiles without errors
- [ ] Application runs without errors
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials in code
- [ ] `application.yml` is not committed

### Week 1
- [ ] Spring Boot project runs without errors
- [ ] Database connection is established
- [ ] `GET /api/v1/hello` returns a response
- [ ] README updated

### Week 2
- [ ] All entities created and tables generated
- [ ] Register endpoint works
- [ ] Login endpoint returns JWT token
- [ ] `/auth/me` returns current user info
- [ ] Password is hashed with BCrypt
- [ ] Password is NOT returned in any response

### Week 3
- [ ] Project CRUD endpoints working
- [ ] Soft delete implemented
- [ ] Member add/remove endpoints working
- [ ] Authorization rules enforced
- [ ] Global exception handler active
- [ ] Validation errors return 400

### Week 4
- [ ] All Task endpoints working
- [ ] Task filtering working
- [ ] Task status flow validated
- [ ] End-to-end Postman test completed
- [ ] Project README complete
- [ ] Postman collection committed
